input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.3.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.3.3.2
            TITLE: the throttle actuation system must use two or more return springs located at the throttle

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.3.3.2: The throttle actuation system must use two or more return springs located at the throttle
IC.3.3.2 The throttle actuation system must use two or more return springs located at the throttle 
body.   
Throttle Position Sensors (TPS) are NOT acceptable as return springs

final_answer: The throttle actuation system must use two or more return springs located at the throttle body. Throttle Position Sensors (TPS) are NOT acceptable as return springs
